company_summary: Ricoh USA is the American subsidiary of Ricoh Company Ltd, a Japanese multinational specialising in imaging, printing, document management, and workplace technology solutions. The company has been actively shifting from hardware-centric products toward digital services, cloud-based document workflows, and smart workplace platforms. Ricoh's current strategic direction emphasises digital transformation services, managed print services, and IT solutions for enterprise customers.
fit_indicators: Intern PM role likely involves internal tooling or workflow software — Sudheer built billing, attendance, and design approval systems at RNTBCI used across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi daily operations, demonstrating direct internal product ownership experience

Ricoh is driving digital transformation and document workflow automation — Sudheer's legacy modernisation and microservices work at RNTBCI directly mirrors enterprise-grade software transition projects

Product Owner roles require translating technical systems into stakeholder-facing requirements — Sudheer's cross-functional work bridging engineering and operations across a three-brand automotive org demonstrates this skill

MBA intern PM roles often involve AI or automation opportunity scoping — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, positioning him to identify and frame AI integration opportunities within Ricoh's product suite
OKTA auth implementation at RNTBCI signals enterprise SaaS and identity management familiarity, relevant to Ricoh's managed IT and cloud services product context

contact_targets.title: Product Manager or Senior Product Manager
contact_targets.reason: Direct hiring manager or day-to-day mentor for the intern PM role — best positioned to evaluate fit and advocate for Sudheer within the team

contact_targets.title: Engineering Manager or Tech Lead
contact_targets.reason: Works alongside PM interns on delivery; can speak to technical credibility and vouch for Sudheer's engineering background as a differentiator
